meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your first project.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' trap, use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold and deploy a production-ready feature. By integrating Antigravity for architectural planning, you move from zero code to a functional, high-quality project in hours, demonstrating technical mastery and AI-assisted workflow efficiency to future employers.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub profile, the silence of an empty commit history echoing the fear that you aren't 'ready' for the industry. The gap between theoretical tutorials and professional-grade software feels like an unbridgeable canyon. You know the syntax, but you lack the battle-tested experience that hiring managers demand.

This is the turning point. By mastering the synergy between Antigravity’s architectural intelligence and Claude Code’s execution engine, you stop being a student who watches and start being an engineer who ships. We are going to transform your 'no portfolio' status into a showcase of modern, AI-augmented development.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define your project scope to ensure it solves a real-world problem. Use Antigravity to generate a technical design document.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Software Architect. Design a simple, scalable SaaS project idea for a student portfolio. Include the tech stack, database schema, and core features.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Set up your workspace with Claude Code to ensure your environment is configured for rapid development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a list of essential environment variables and local development setup steps for a TypeScript/Node.js project.

steps.title: Core Feature Development
steps.description: Implement the core logic using Claude Code's iterative coding capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular function for user authentication using JWT and secure password hashing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement the auth controller based on the provided design document."

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Professional code is tested code. Use AI to generate robust unit tests for your logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of Jest tests for the authentication module covering edge cases and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Generate and run unit tests for the src/controllers/auth.ts file."

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize your project with a high-quality README that explains your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md for a GitHub repository, focusing on the problem solved, tech stack, and installation instructions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Document the codebase and update the README with installation steps."

pro_tips: Always ask Claude Code to explain the 'why' behind a specific architectural choice to deepen your internal knowledge.
Use Antigravity to simulate 'what-if' scenarios, such as how your app would handle 10,000 concurrent users.
Commit early and often with descriptive messages; your commit history is your resume.
Refactor your AI-generated code manually at least once to ensure you understand every line before pushing.
Keep your project scope narrow; a single high-quality, bug-free feature is worth more than a bloated, broken app.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, write a blog post detailing the challenges you faced and how you used AI to overcome them. Then, link this repository to your LinkedIn profile to showcase your new workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Your first project is the gateway to your future career, and with these tools, you are already ahead of the curve. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
